column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Clear , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: Lots of soft snow on LB at station but control appears clear. Some snow in contact with water at gauge pool but nowhere else in sight. If there is a backwater effect it is surely less than 5%.
column14: First time using Cablefox here, low speed tethered boat worked well. Did not use GPS as the battery failed. Measured under 50%, RB edge >5%, lost data near RB... This would work better at higher flows, or could try StreamPro but sediment load might be too high. Use mmt with caution. @ Uncertainty: QRev Uncertainty Analysis (DS Mueller, 2016), 2-sigma value (1 x Uncertainty Value reported in *.xml File). @ No full levels today, too much snow on ground. Reset HG to 3.970m at 10:12pst. ADCP by Moving Boat
